allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(k,':',v\) for k,v in d.get\('scripts',{}\).items\(\)]")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://stag-platypus-au.accentgra.com/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -H 'Origin: https://stag-platypus-au.accentgra.com' --max-time 30 -d '{"query":"query { products\(filter: { category_id: { eq: \\"2\\" } }, pageSize: 20, sort: { name: ASC }\) { items { sku name url_key stock_status __typename } total_count } }"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(i['sku'], i['stock_status'], i['url_key']\) for i in d.get\('data',{}\).get\('products',{}\).get\('items',[]\)]")
